item.title: Traffic light out of alignment, 21st April
item.description:
Because this pedestrian signal is baffled, and out of alignment, it cannot properly be seen from those wishing to cross and could be considered a danger. I have reported this on previous occasions and believe that, when realigned, its fixings should be tightened more securely.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Notting Hill Gate, Notting Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Group of large potholes obstructing right turn towards Shortlands tavern., 21st April
item.description:
Many large potholes that are damaging cars. Hard to avoid when turning right. This is going to cost me.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree continuously shedding and sticky sap, 21st April
item.description:
Hello, a year on and i am having to report this issue again. There is a tree outside my property that is producing a large amount of sticky sap and shedding debris, which is falling directly onto my driveway. This substance is coating my parked vehicles, causing mess and potential damage to the paintwork, and requires frequent cleaning. The issue is ongoing and becoming increasingly problematic, so I would appreciate the tree being inspected and appropriate action taken. Please see attached photos of tree sap that accumulated over a 48 hour period. In addition to rinsing the car off daily, I am having to take my car to be properly cleaned a couple of times a week, to completely remove the sap tree albeit briefly to try and minimise additional damage to the paintwork. This is obviously having financial implications. It has been identified by the personnel at the location where I have my car cleaned to remove the sap remnants, that the sap is causing damage to the paintwork on my car. I have been advised my complaint case has been closed and maintenance on the tree concerned is not scheduled until 2026. What scheduled maintenance is due on the tree at this time? Some of the branches from the tree are overhanging onto my driveway, so are infringing onto the boundary of my property. As a homeowner, I understand that I have a common law right regarding overhanging branches. I do not live in a conservation area, what is the process to escalate my issue?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Harcourt Avenue, Blendon, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 59 and 61 HMOs rubbish dumping AGAIN, 21st April
item.description:
Both properties dumped general waste in the street. Already attracting flies. HMOs should have there own waste management system. And the tenants need to be educated on bin days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
